title: schizachyrium scoparium subvar. flexile
intro: Schizachyrium scoparium subvar. flexile, also known as flexible little bluestem, is a subvariety of the Schizachyrium scoparium plant, a native grass species found in North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing respiratory issues. The flexible little bluestem can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
